review_title: Asanify - One Platform for all HR Requirements
description: We are a happy customer with Asanify. The pricing, the support and ease of using the system, helped us to stay organized in our everyday operations and it has saved a lot of time for sure.
author: Yashwanth N.
pros: The software is very user-friendly, easy to learn and use. It provides lots of features required for day to day HR operations. It provides platform for employee documentation, has well planned attendance and leave management systems. It comes with comprehensive payroll management system and we can also setup KPI for performance assessments. As the name says "Asanify" simplifies every organization's HR requirements and helps in staying organized all the time.
cons: Asanify has consciously put on lot of efforts in understanding the HR requirements and I should agree, they have provided a platform that suits requirements of all types of organizations. I believe it could be made further user friendly. Few features which are made mandatory can be revisited and modified.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Perfectly suited for fast growing startups
description: Fantastic. It's become critical to my HR Operations in the company. I no longer have to worry about any people related matters or payroll
author: Prerna B.
pros: Getting started on the platform was amazingly easy. Ongoing chat support makes things very easy for the team as well
cons: Not exactly a con, but can improve employee recognition through the platform
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Charu P.
pros: easy to use and understand by most of the employees; customer support is great
cons: cannot be customised; some options will be better run if selective usage can be grated, or selective access to be granted rather than blanket admin access to all

author: MansiHR M.

review_title: One Stop Solutions for complete employee life cycle

cons: 1. Performance Management to implement- where employee performance can be monitored and reviews can be shared in real time. 2. Notification mailer on completion of probation period in Asanify to be implemented. 3. Resignation option is not available

review_title: Best alternate for HR department for a Start Up
description: It's been a great experience till now. Asanify helped to set up an HR HR department and eliminated the need to have an HR team for payroll and employee engagement and employee management process. We have one person managing the whole process now.
author: Dilip L.
pros: Excellent Support and always approachable. Customization at every module to align with our business. Eliminates the need for a big team to handle the HR activites. Quick communication from Asanify team for any request.
cons: The initial setting up process can be more simplified
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Good platform and responsible team members
author: Navdeep K.
pros: Attendance and leaves tracking systems are easy to use and export to excel sheets for the records resulting in accurate employee data. Moreover, OKR and performance-based goal setup are really helpful to track the productivity of the employees. Hence Hiring module can help you to attract talent from the pool as they will create your company profile.
cons: Some of the customizations may be needed from time to time to keep up in the market.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
